name: Fettuccine with Cream, Basil and Romano
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a heavy medium skillet over medium heat until it begins to brown.
2. Add the green onions and stir until they are softened, about 1 minute.
3. Add the cream and simmer until it begins to thicken, about 1 minute.
4. Mix in half of the Romano cheese, chopped fresh basil, and season with salt and freshly ground pepper.
5. Meanwhile, cook the fettuccine in a large pot of boiling salted water until it is just tender but still firm to the bite, stirring occasionally.
6. Drain well and return the pasta to the hot pot.
7. Add the sauce and stir to coat evenly.
8. Serve immediately, passing additional cheese separately.
